message:
✨ Show last intent in tile headers and tab tooltips, fix tile→single remount (#111)

Intent display:
- Add lastIntent field to TermTab, captured via term.onTitleChange
- Poll tmux pane titles every 8s for sessions that set title before attach
- Server: GET /api/tmux-sessions/:name/title endpoint
- Tile headers show intent in italic blue after tab name
- Tab hover tooltips show the current intent text

Tile→single remount fix:
- When exiting tile mode, proactively move ALL terminals back to their
  single containers (not just the active tab)
- Prevents blank terminal when switching tabs after leaving tile mode
- Force full refresh after reparenting detached xterm elements

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
